summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber live National TV Game in market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a National TV Game scheduled/in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg

**NOTE:**
National TV game = FOX Saturday Baseball or ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN the user views the National TV game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout badge is displayed in the top left of the game tile
AND "Stream on: <national_broadcast_partner>" is displayed above "Broadcast Networks"
